scope: Implement the match-confirm slice for work/2D-FPS-game: explicit player-confirmed match reset, winner overlay confirmation feedback, and scene integration that replaces the old automatic match restart.
constraints: Use work/2D-FPS-game as the runtime baseline
Keep long-term Unity docs as roadmap reference only
Treat Vision as planner and Ultron as executor
Keep gameplay logic in src/domain and scene wiring in src/scenes
Prefer deterministic combat state that can be tested without Phaser runtime
Keep reload and ammo state in domain logic rather than the Phaser scene
Reuse the current combat and respawn helpers instead of replacing the scene loop
Round scoring and match-end rules should be deterministic and not depend on rendering timing
Match-end flow should remain deterministic and not auto-reset without player input
Finish with type-check, lint, test, and build passing
acceptance: Match-end state no longer resets automatically
Winner overlay shows confirmation guidance for the next match
Pressing the confirm key returns the scene to a fresh match cycle
Execution status is synced for Vision review
nextActions: Run verification and write the execution report
